race.comment: SHOUTABOUTIT (11) drops in grade and trip and comes here in peak condition. Went out quickly and had nothing left in the tank when seventh over 1350m at Wyong in BM64 grade. Winning rider hops back on and assess on earlier efforts. FLYING SHELLY (9) handy mare with good fresh credentials. Now in the Sally Taylor stable after she finished eighth over 1200m at the Sunshine Coast. Finished third in a recent 800m trial at Coffs Harbour. Bold showing anticipated with the claim. TELEGRAPH (2) jumped in class and appreciated the big weight drop when he sat on the speed for a game win over 1007m at this track. At his top for this and stays in the calculations. WHAT A RUSH (3) has a good record here but is struggling to come up with a decent barrier. Came out quickly from the wide gate and was found wanting in the straight when seventh at this course and distance. Key jockey change and sure to be thereabouts.
